## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions bot-psychologist
  Verify: grep -q 'bot-psychologist' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md

## test-exempt justification
Static asset (Markdown table row), no conditional logic (unit exemption criteria 1+3)
